name: 01-single-actionable
description: /muggle-do invoked with one actionable review. Classifies it as actionable, runs the cycle (build → unit tests → ONE E2E → push), posts inline replies on the two line comments, runs resolve-reminder posting one top-level comment, respawns the watcher.

stages_run: build (apply changes for comments 9001 and 9002 — rename + const)
unit-tests (create or update tests touching the changed lines)
open-prs in address-reviews mode (push def4560, refresh title/desc if needed, post walkthrough)
per-comment-replies (one threaded reply on comment 9001, one on comment 9002)
resolve-reminder (top-level comment listing threads T_1 and T_2)

state_writes.last_seen.json: reviewId advanced to 4295962900; last_pushed_sha set to def4560; cycles_completed 1→2; pushed_shas appended with def4560

side_effects: POST /repos/acme/widget/pulls/142/comments/9001/replies body='Addressed in def4560: renamed fooBar to foo_bar.'
POST /repos/acme/widget/pulls/142/comments/9002/replies body='Addressed in def4560: switched the binding from let to const.'
gh pr comment 142 body='I addressed these threads in def4560 — mark them resolved when satisfied:\n- #T_1\n- #T_2'
expected.notes: ONE push and ONE E2E pass for the WHOLE batch (here, two comments). Two inline replies (one per comment), one top-level resolve-reminder. The watcher is respawned at the very end.
